---
name: RFC proposal
about: Propose a substantial design (spans subsystems or changes a public contract)
title: "RFC: <short title>"
labels: ["rfc", "needs-triage"]
---

<!-- Before writing a full RFC, socialize the idea here. A maintainer will help decide
     whether this needs an RFC, an ADR, or an AEP. See process/rfc-process.md. -->

## Problem
<!-- What is broken/missing/unclear, and who is affected? -->

## Why this needs an RFC (not an ADR)
<!-- Multiple decisions? Cross-cutting? Changes a public contract? -->

## Rough sketch of the idea
<!-- Optional early sketch. The full design goes in the RFC document from the template. -->

## Affected Books / subsystems
